{\n300\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Column = %d, want %d\", err.Column, tt.column)\n301\t\t\t\t}\n302\t\t\t\tif err.Expected != tt.expected {\n303\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected = %q, want %q\", err.Expected, tt.expected)\n304\t\t\t\t}\n305\t\t\t\tif err.Actual != tt.actual {\n306\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Actual = %q, want %q\", err.Actual, tt.actual)\n307\t\t\t\t}\n308\t\t\t\tif err.Code() != tt.wantCode {\n309\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Code() = %q, want %q\", err.Code(), tt.wantCode)\n310\t\t\t\t}\n311\t\t\t\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != tt.wantErrorType {\n312\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"YAMLErrorType() = %q, want %q\", err.YAMLErrorType(), tt.wantErrorType)\n313\t\t\t\t}\n314\t\n315\t\t\t\t// Verify Error() method returns formatted message with position\n316\t\t\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n317\t\t\t\tif errorMsg != tt.wantMessage {\n318\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", errorMsg, tt.wantMessage)\n319\t\t\t\t}\n320\t\n321\t\t\t\t// Verify it's recognized as a YAMLError\n322\t\t\t\tif !IsYAMLError(err) {\n323\t\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"NewParseError() should implement YAMLError interface\")\n324\t\t\t\t}\n325\t\n326\t\t\t\t// Verify it's recognized as a ParseError\n327\t\t\t\tif !IsParseError(err) {\n328\t\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"NewParseError() should be recognized as ParseError\")\n329\t\t\t\t}\n330\t\t\t})\n331\t\t}\n332\t}\n333\t\n334\t// Helper function to check if a string contains a substring\n335\tfunc contains(s, substr string) bool {\n336\t\treturn len(s) >= len(substr) && (s == substr || len(s) > len(substr) && containsHelper(s, substr))\n337\t}\n338\t\n339\tfunc containsHelper(s, substr string) bool {\n340\t\tfor i := 0; i <= len(s)-len(substr); i++ {\n341\t\t\tif s[i:i+len(substr)] == substr {\n342\t\t\t\treturn true\n343\t\t\t}\n344\t\t}\n345\t\treturn false\n346\t}\n347\t\n348\tfunc TestNewValidationError(t *testing.T) {\n349\t\ttests := []struct {\n350\t\t\tname         string\n351\t\t\tfilePath     string\n352\t\t\tmessage
